title: carex scopulorum
intro: Carex scopulorum, also known as Rocky Mountain sedge, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Carex scopulorum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce coughs, and alleviate congestion. Carex scopulorum can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
